title: aspidium lonchitis
intro: Aspidium lonchitis, also known as the Polypodium lonchitis or Polypodium lunare, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Aspidium lonchitis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Aspidium lonchitis is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
